articles.title: Arizona passes first bill to establish Bitcoin reserve
articles.description: Arizona Governor Katie Hobbs has signed House Bill 2749 into law, establishing a Bitcoin and Digital Assets Reserve Fund, making the state the second in the US to create such a framework. The signing came shortly after Hobbs vetoed a separate crypto-related bill last Friday. The new law, backed by Representative Jeff Weninger with bipartisan support, modernizes Arizona's unclaimed property laws to include digital assets and creates a state-managed reserve fund for holding and potentially growi.
